strengths: Exceeds minimum experience requirement with ~19 years in software engineering and multiple Staff-level IC roles
Demonstrated technical versatility across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pair programming)
Recent hands-on engagement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks at current role (re:cinq), showing active involvement with cutting-edge AI tooling
concerns: Missing preferred qualification of Master's or PhD in AI-related field; academic background is general CS and unrelated photography disciplines
No demonstrated track record of shipped AI products, ML platforms, or recognized AI expertise; current AI work is recent (April 2025) and infrastructure-focused rather than strategic

Career trajectory emphasizes individual contributor excellence and technical craftsmanship rather than strategic platform leadership; founder experience is open-source project, not venture-scale startup
response.justification: Bogdan meets the fundamental experience requirement (19 years) and demonstrates strong technical craftsmanship across multiple domains. However, the role specifically seeks a 'Principal Engineer — Specialized Software (AI Strategy)' with 'recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI.' His resume shows only recent (April 2025) involvement with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, with no demonstrated AI products, ML platforms, or strategic AI advisory experience. His career emphasizes individual contributor excellence and technical depth rather than strategic platform leadership or AI domain expertise. While his current role suggests movement toward AI infrastructure, the breadth, depth, and demonstrated impact in AI strategy fall significantly short of the preferred qualifications.
